name: ModelInfo
summary: The ModelInfo class provides information about the currently open Tekla Structures model.

properties.name: CurrentPhase
properties.summary: The number of the Tekla Structures model's current phase.

properties.name: ModelName
properties.summary: The name of the Tekla Structures model.

properties.name: ModelPath
properties.summary: The path to the Tekla Structures model.

properties.name: NorthDirection
properties.summary: The north direction of the current Tekla Structures model.

properties.name: SharedModel
properties.summary: The read-only property of the Tekla Structures model's sharing status.

properties.name: SingleUserModel
properties.summary: The read-only property if the Tekla Structures model is a single user model.
